workflow: strictLocal fit + QC + NMF + report + bundled-context MAF conversion

blockedPaths.label: mSigPortal sample-specific spectrum fetch
blockedPaths.message: strictLocal blocked mSigPortal sample-specific mutational spectrum fetch because it would transmit user-derived data outside this device. Remove sample IDs from the network request or run with locally supplied spectra.

blockedPaths.label: UCSC live context lookup
blockedPaths.message: strictLocal blocked UCSC reference context lookup because it would transmit user-derived data outside this device. Chromosome and coordinate values would be sent in the URL; supply row contexts or a bundled/offline contextLookupTable.
